items.title: Does Pauline Hanson's claim of growing support in the ACT pass the pub test?

items.title: 'Systemic issue': Abuse sees Canberra referees quitting after a year

children.content: Canberra soccer match officials say referee abuse is a "systemic issue" across all sporting codes, with increasingly hostile behaviour from spectators, players and coaches causing 44 per cent of Capital Football's referees to leave their roles after a year.

items.title: How a discarded coffee cup helped solve a 24-year cold case killing

items.title: What happened when the ABC went to uncover Bali's 'Island of Trash'

children.content: Known to many as the Island of the Gods, residents fear Bali may soon become the "Island of Trash" due to a deluge of tourists, a lack of rubbish education and the partial closure of a much-needed landfill facility.
